home.title: ScoreMatrix | Football Predictions, Live Scores and Rewards
home.description: ScoreMatrix is a skill-based football prediction platform with live scores, AI match insights, leaderboards, missions and redeemable rewards. No real money gambling.
home.keywords: football predictions, soccer predictions, live scores, AI football analysis, football rewards, prediction leaderboard, skill-based prediction game, no gambling football app

matches.title: Matches | ScoreMatrix Football Schedule and Live Match Center
matches.description: Explore live, upcoming and finished football matches across global leagues with form trends, match status, kickoff times and prediction entry points on ScoreMatrix.
matches.keywords: football matches, match schedule, live football matches, upcoming matches, football fixtures, soccer fixtures, match center, ScoreMatrix matches

common.noGambling: No cash withdrawal. No real money gambling.
common.disclaimer: ScoreMatrix is a skill-based prediction game. Points have no cash value and cannot be withdrawn as currency.

auth.acceptTerms: I accept the Terms of Service
auth.termsRequired: You must accept the Terms of Service
auth.usernameMinLength: Username must be at least 3 characters
auth.usernameMaxLength: Username must be at most 20 characters
auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.taglineSub: Create your account and start predicting
auth.marketingConsent: Send me match news, points promotions and reward updates by email
auth.dataUseNote: Passwords should be stored as hashes only. Profile data is used to personalize language, favorite teams, missions and leaderboards.
auth.phoneInvalid: Please enter a valid phone number
auth.birthYearInvalid: Users must be at least 13 years old
auth.registerInfoTitle: Data to collect during sign up
auth.requiredDataUsername: Username for leaderboards and profile pages
auth.requiredDataEmail: Email for login, password recovery and important notices
auth.requiredDataPassword: Password stored as a hash, never as plain text
auth.recommendedDataProfile: Display name, favorite team, language and country
auth.recommendedDataBirthYear: Birth year for minimum age checks, without storing full date of birth
auth.recommendedDataConsent: Marketing consent kept separate from terms acceptance
auth.avoidDataFinancial: Financial data because this is not a real-money product
auth.avoidDataSensitive: Plain passwords or personal data beyond what is necessary
auth.identifierRequired: Please enter your email or username
auth.loginSubtitle: Return to ScoreMatrix to track points, predictions and rewards.
auth.loginSecurityNote: A production system should support rate limits, session expiry, login history and 2FA.
auth.loginInfoTitle: What the login page should include
auth.loginFormRemember: Remember me for personal devices only
auth.loginSecurity2fa: Support 2FA or OTP for accounts with pending rewards
auth.loginSecurityError: Error messages should not reveal whether email or password was wrong
auth.afterLoginRedirect: Return users to the page they intended to open
auth.afterLoginSession: Update language, timezone and session state
auth.afterLoginAudit: Record last login time for audit history
auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter the email used for your account. We will send a password reset link.
auth.resetLinkSent: Request sent. If this email has an account, you will receive a reset link.
auth.referralCodeHint: If a friend invited you, their code will be applied here so both accounts can receive rewards after qualification.

xg.title: Understanding xG: A Data-Driven Guide

seoContent.title: Football match predictions, live scores and rewards in one platform
seoContent.description: ScoreMatrix brings match schedules, live football scores, AI-powered insight, prediction missions and leaderboard competition into one skill-based experience. Players earn points through football knowledge and consistency, then redeem those points for digital and merchandise rewards without cash withdrawal or real-money gambling.

predictions.title: Predict with context
predictions.text: Review team form, head-to-head notes, kickoff times and AI confidence before submitting your match prediction.

liveScores.title: Track live scores
liveScores.text: Follow live match status, scores and upcoming fixtures across European and Asian football leagues.

rewards.title: Earn rewards safely
rewards.text: Complete missions, climb leaderboards and redeem points for non-cash rewards in a transparent entertainment platform.

worldCup2026.title: World Cup 2026 Groups
worldCup2026.description: Pick Group A-L to scan teams, standings and matchup cards in a quick sports-results layout.
worldCup2026.timeZone: Times shown in Thailand time: Asia/Bangkok (ICT, UTC+7)
worldCup2026.sourceNote: Before kickoff, every team starts on 0 points. The table is ordered by group draw position for quick scanning.

spotlights.A: Opening path: Mexico City, Guadalajara, Atlanta
spotlights.B: Canada starts at home with a tight European test
spotlights.C: Brazil and Morocco headline one of the most watchable groups
spotlights.D: The United States route runs through Paraguay, Australia and Turkiye
spotlights.E: Germany meets Ecuador, Cote d’Ivoire and Curacao
spotlights.F: Netherlands, Japan, Sweden and Tunisia bring four distinct styles
spotlights.G: Belgium, Egypt and Iran chase control against New Zealand
spotlights.H: Spain and Uruguay share a group with Saudi Arabia and Cape Verde
spotlights.I: France, Senegal, Norway and Iraq make the heavy traffic group
spotlights.J: Argentina starts the defense against Algeria, Austria and Jordan
spotlights.K: Portugal faces Colombia, Uzbekistan and DR Congo
spotlights.L: England, Croatia, Ghana and Panama close the group map
